allow: Bash(find . -name '*.tsx' -exec sed -i '' -e 's/bg-gradient-to-r from-green-600 to-green-700/bg-primary/g' -e 's/bg-green-900/bg-\\[#333333\\]/g' -e s/bg-green-700/bg-primary/g -e s/bg-green-600/bg-primary/g -e s/bg-green-500/bg-primary/g -e 's/bg-green-100/bg-primary\\/10/g' -e 's/bg-green-50/bg-secondary\\/20/g' '{}' +)
